title: PokePlushie for Cobblemon
description: A simple command to get Cobblemon plushies (models)!
body:
## PokePlushies!

Simple command that lets you grab a Cobblemon plushie (model) from the corresponding party slot. You have to actually own the mon to get a plushie version of it. Get decorating.

`/pokeplushie <slotnumber>`: Gives you a plushie of the mon on the slot.
